meta.title: Kulembelela umwe mulimo wa kukundama ku yikungululo

hero.title: Kulembelela umwe mulimo wa kukundama ku yikungululo
hero.lead: IATF kakuhehwojola yipikalo ya milimo ya kukundama yize yafuma ha usona wa umwenemwene.
support: Kutachikiza kanawa ukalu wacho, ni yoze unakapinjisa, ni mumu liaka chili chilemu, chili wika chitangu.

intro: Jijila josena jeji kupwanga mu mukanda umuwika.

items.label: Site web
items.body: Kuzachisa fomu yize yili ha kusula hanga uhanjike mukanda.

items.label: E-mail
items.body: Tumina yihula yacho kuli: {{contact.requestsEmail}}Yihula ya ku email muyihasa kupwa yisoneko ya kuyula ya mbunga ha kupwa kuyinyonga ni kuyisoneka.

items.label: Kulipika
items.body: Ha kuputuka kuli iye, nyi chino chili chashi.

guidance.title: Shimbu kanda utuma mukanda
paragraphs: IATF yakulingila ku mbunga ya atu eswe.

Kanda kuhanjikanga ma adresi, ni nambala ja telefone, ni sango ja yikola, hanji sango jize jakukwasa kunyingika mutu yoze wakuzachisa makina ja kukwasa, ndo muze muchikukwasa, nawa nyi mutachikijila ngwo IATF muyikuhengwola.
IATF kakuchiza yinyingi ya usongwelo wa atu yize kuyishi ni ulemu shimbu kanda asonekene mikanda ya yiyulo.

review.title: Kuhehwojola yize atu anashimbwila
paragraphs: IATF kakuhehwojola yipikalo ya mulimo wacho, ni kunyingika nyi mulimo wacho uli ni ulemu, ni nyi muulo wa milimo yacho uli ha chihela cha atu.
Yihula yimwe muyihasa kuyakana, kuyinunga hanji kuyilumuna shimbu kanda ayifwe.

fields.name: Yuma ya kulita ni atu
fields.label: Yuma ya kulita ni atu
fields.helper: Adresi ya e-mail hanji jina lia Discord hanga ulondeze.
fields.placeholder: Adresi ya E-mail hanji jina lia Discord

fields.name: malimi
fields.label: Kuhanjika lilimi
fields.helper: Lilimi lize unazange, nyi chili ni ulemu.

fields.name: yipikalu
fields.label: Yipikalo yika yena unazange kukumbulula?
fields.helper: Lumbununenu chinjikizo chacho mu malimi apema.

fields.name: extraContext
fields.label: Yuma Yikwo
fields.helper: Hanjikenu yuma yikwo yize muyihasa kulumbunuka usolo wacho: mumu liaka chili chilemu, yilweza, yikuma yize muyisolola, manyonga apema a software, hanji ha mashimbu akusa.

fields.name: openSourceConsent
fields.label: Kutala unanyingika kanawa mulimo wakulongesa Mbimbiliya?
fields.helper: Yikungulwila yize akutayiza yinapu yikungulwila ya mbunga ya IATF.

items: Chizuvo cha atu eswe mu ululikiso wa IATF GitHub
mukwa-kusongwela yoze wakwata mulimo wa mulimo wacho
License ya copyleft ya code ni yikuma ya mulimo
Yikungululo ya usongwelo wa atu ha chijimbikilo

header.title: Chihula chichindende chize chinasoloka chinapema hanga uputuke

paragraphs: Nyi uli ni ushindakenyo wamwenemwene ha uputukilo ni kunyonga ngwo muwatamba kupwa mulimo wa mbunga, tutumikine sango liacho.
